item.title: Silent catch blocks in design/ swallow errors with no logging
item.intent: No error in the design/ module is silently discarded. Blueprint load failures and Ollama inference errors must be logged. A blueprint that fails to load silently is indistinguishable from one that doesn't exist.
item.description: 8 catch blocks across design/ swallow errors silently. Key locations: src/design/configure/smart.ts (lines 122,273 — blueprint lookup and JSON parse failures), src/design/configure/ollama.ts (lines 41,62 — Ollama availability check and model listing failures), src/design/blueprints/loader.ts (line 224 — silently skips a blueprint that fails to load, indistinguishable from missing blueprint), src/design/tools/approve-action.ts (lines 50,89,139 — queue JSON parse, Telegram config read, and Telegram API call failures). The loader.ts instance is especially problematic — a blueprint that fails validation or load is silently skipped, the user sees an incomplete blueprint list with no explanation. Steps: (1) search design/ for 'catch {' and 'catch (_' patterns, excluding writer.ts cleanup catches (intentional best-effort); (2) for each non-fatal catch, add console.warn() with the error and context; (3) do NOT convert non-fatal catches to throws — keep fallback behaviour; (4) run design/ tests to confirm no regression. Scope: ~8 one-line additions across 4 files.
